item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min This is not something I’ll be losing sleep over - we can’t afford to lose any more d
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 3min This is not something I’ll be losing sleep over - we can’t afford to lose any more during this event - but what are your feelings on a re-rack here?
I get that the players agreed to it. But snooker is supposed to be an intricate game of chess at times not just a potting contest. 1 1 3 77

item.title: champdarts: Phill Barrs reposteó Championship Darts Corporation @champdarts · 59min Night Two of the 2026 CDC Cross-Border Darts Cha
item.description:
Phill Barrs reposteó Championship Darts Corporation @champdarts · 59min Night Two of the 2026 CDC Cross-Border Darts Challenge gets underway at 7 pm ( Newfoundland ) 5:30 pm Eastern/ 2:30 Pacific
LIVE on http:// pdc.tv and http:// YouTube.com/@champdarts
Let’s Go! 1 1 88

item.description:

Zhao Xintong - Liam Highfield
The World champ has hit his stride at a vital moment in the contest

item.title:
